languages.text: Тайна пропажи Себериана фон Валанциуса раскрыта. И не просто раскрыта — вот он, своей персоной, стоит на мостике флагмана. Воистину, Бог-Император был к нему милостив.

The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.
languages.original_text: Тайна пропажи Себериана фон Валанциуса раскрыта. И не просто раскрыта — вот он, своей персоной, стоит на мостике флагмана. Воистину, Бог-Император был к нему милостив.

traits.locale_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

languages.text: バルアンシウス・シベリアンの行方不明の謎が解明された。そして、単に解明されただけでなく、ここに彼は肉体となって旗艦のブリッジに立っている。神帝は彼に慈悲を示したのだ。
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

traits.locale_text: バルアンシウス・シベリアンの行方不明の謎が解明された。そして、単に解明されただけでなく、ここに彼は肉体となって旗艦のブリッジに立っている。神帝は彼に慈悲を示したのだ。

languages.text: El misterio de la desaparición de Seberian von Valancius ha quedado resuelto con creces. Está presente, en carne y hueso, en el puente de la nave insignia. En verdad, el Dios Emperador se ha apiadado de él.
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

traits.locale_text: El misterio de la desaparición de Seberian von Valancius ha quedado resuelto con creces. Está presente, en carne y hueso, en el puente de la nave insignia. En verdad, el Dios Emperador se ha apiadado de él.

languages.text: Das Geheimnis um das Verschwinden von Seberian von Valancius ist gelöst. Und nicht nur das ... er steht nun in Fleisch und Blut auf der Brücke des Flaggschiffs. Der Gottimperator war ihm tatsächlich gnädig.
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

traits.locale_text: Das Geheimnis um das Verschwinden von Seberian von Valancius ist gelöst. Und nicht nur das ... er steht nun in Fleisch und Blut auf der Brücke des Flaggschiffs. Der Gottimperator war ihm tatsächlich gnädig.

languages.text: Le mystère de la disparition de Seberian von Valancius a été résolu. Plus incroyable encore, votre ancêtre se tient à présent devant vous, en chair et en os, sur le pont de votre vaisseau amiral. L'Empereur-Dieu a été miséricordieux à son encontre.
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

traits.locale_text: Le mystère de la disparition de Seberian von Valancius a été résolu. Plus incroyable encore, votre ancêtre se tient à présent devant vous, en chair et en os, sur le pont de votre vaisseau amiral. L'Empereur-Dieu a été miséricordieux à son encontre.

languages.text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯失踪之谜已经解开，不仅真相大白，他本人也现身于旗舰舰桥之上。诚然，他得到了神皇仁慈的眷顾。
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.

traits.locale_text: 塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯失踪之谜已经解开，不仅真相大白，他本人也现身于旗舰舰桥之上。诚然，他得到了神皇仁慈的眷顾。

languages.text: Seberian von Valancius'un kayboluşunun ardındaki gizem çözüldü. Sadece çözülmekle de kalmadı... Seberian şu anda kanlı canlı hâlde sancak gemisinin köprüsünde duruyor. Gerçekten de Tanrı İmparator ona merhamet etmiş.
languages.original_text: The mystery of Seberian von Valancius's disappearance has been solved. And not merely solved — here he now stands, in the flesh, on the flagship's bridge. Indeed, the God-Emperor has been merciful to him.
